'''Jack Croft''' (born 21 December 2000) is a professional [[rugby league]] footballer who plays as a {{rlp|sr}} or {{rlp|ce}} for the [[London Broncos]] in the [[RFL Championship]].

Croft has previously had time on loan at [[Oldham RLFC]], [[Newcastle Thunder]], [[Barrow Raiders]] and the [[Salford Red Devils]].

==Playing career==
===Wakefield Trinity===
In 2019 he made his [[Challenge Cup]] début for [[Wakefield Trinity|Wakefield]] against [[St Helens R.F.C.|St Helens]].<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.bbc.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/match/EVP3039233|title=Challenge Cup: St Helens v Wakefield Trinity|publisher=BBC}}</ref>

===Oldham (loan)===
On 28 April 2021 it was reported that he had signed for [[Oldham RLFC|Oldham]] in the [[RFL Championship]] on a season-long loan.<ref>{{cite web|website=Love Rugby League|date=28 Apr 2021|accessdate=28 Apr 2021|title=Jack Croft joins Oldham on season-long loan|url=https://www.loverugbyleague.com/post/jack-croft-joins-oldham-on-season-long-loan/}}</ref>

===Salford Red Devils (loan)===
On 27 August 2025 it was reported that he had signed for [[Salford Red Devils]] in the [[Super League]] on loan on a game-by-game basis<ref>{{cite web|website=Total RL|date=27 Aug 2025|accessdate=30 Aug 2025|author=Stephen Ibbetson|title=Salford Red Devils sign former Super League duo for rest of season|url=https://www.totalrl.com/salford-red-devils-sign-former-super-league-duo-for-rest-of-season/}}</ref>

===London Broncos===
On 16 November 2025 it was reported that he had signed for the [[London Broncos]] in the [[RFL Championship]].<ref>{{cite web|website=Love Rugby League|date=16 Nov 2025|author=Aaron Bower|title=Wakefield Trinity man set for switch to London Broncos in 2026|url=https://www.loverugbyleague.com/post/wakefield-trinity-man-set-for-switch-to-london-broncos-in-2026}}</ref>
